name: Yacht Finders, Inc.
summary: Yacht Finders, Inc. does not have significant operations. It intends to seek, investigate, and, if warranted, acquire one or more properties or businesses. The company was formerly known as Snohomish Corporation and changed its name to Yacht Finders, Inc. in April 2003. Yacht Finders, Inc. was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Haiku, Hawaii. Yacht Finders, Inc. is a subsidiary of Fountainhead Capital Management Limited.
